basic_details.job_title: MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority (MahaRERA) Junior Legal Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website maharera.maharashtra.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: LLB degree with 2 years of experience as a legal consultant or 2 years of practice as a lawyer, or 1 year of experience in MahaRERA. Computer proficiency and drafting skills required.
qualification.details: Degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized university. Proficiency in operating computers and good drafting skills for legal matters. Minimum 02 years of experience as a legal consultant or 02 years of practice as a lawyer in government/semi-government/government undertaking, corporation, or court, or minimum 01 year of experience in Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority (after passing degree examination).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MahaRERA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized university. Proficiency in operating computers and good drafting skills for legal matters. Minimum 02 years of experience as a legal consultant or 02 years of practice as a lawyer in government/semi-government/government undertaking, corporation, or court, or minimum 01 year of experience in Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority (after passing degree examination).

content_sections.heading: MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the MahaRERA Junior Legal Consultant recruitment is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Legal Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized university. Additionally, proficiency in operating computers and good drafting skills for legal matters are essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Junior Legal Consultant post is 38 years. There is no mention of a minimum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Legal Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Legal Consultant position will involve an application screening followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Legal Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Legal Consultant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Legal Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Junior Legal Consultant post in the Maharashtra Real Estate Regulatory Authority (MahaRERA).

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. Candidates will be hired on a contract basis for the Junior Legal Consultant role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified official email address.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the Junior Legal Consultant post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 02 years of experience as a legal consultant or 02 years of practice as a lawyer is required. Alternatively, 01 year of experience in MahaRERA after passing the degree examination is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for MahaRERA's offices in Mumbai and Pune. The specific posting location will be determined based on the needs of the authority.
